name: PEP (Planetary Ephemeris Program)
kind: full astrometric / ephemeris fit engine with LLR support
public_code_status: public-code candidate; paper says source/docs/tests are publicly available via GitLab
public_data_status: works with external ephemerides and heterogeneous astrometric data
rationale: Best external hand-off target found: it is described as an open-source general-purpose astrometric analysis program, its literature explicitly states lunar laser ranging support down to mm-class one-way precision, and ILRS literature shows it has already been used on real LLR data.

name: JPL Lunar Analysis Center / DE pipeline
kind: mature internal LLR analysis center workflow
public_code_status: ephemerides and reader toolkits public; full fit engine not identified as public
public_data_status: public DE ephemerides and SPICE readers available
rationale: Clearly mature and high-performing for LLR, but the public-facing assets are the DE ephemerides and access toolkits rather than a released end-to-end estimator. This is a credible collaboration / external-analysis route, not a drop-in public code hand-off.

name: POLAC / ELPN
kind: mature lunar analysis-center ephemeris and fit workflow
public_code_status: public analysis-center capability; no public code path identified in bounded scout
public_data_status: public predictions and analysis-center outputs described
rationale: Strong science maturity and explicit use for LLR fundamental-physics fits, including variational equations and SME-style extensions, but the bounded scout did not identify a public code release suitable as a local estimator drop-in.

name: INPOP + CALCEPH
kind: public ephemerides + open-source ephemeris access layer
llr_fit_engine: not in public code found here
public_code_status: reader libraries public; fit engine not identified as public
public_data_status: ephemeris files public; Moon residual computation offered to users
integration_effort: medium for ephemeris side, high for full posterior
rationale: Useful if the project needs a public ephemeris / residual-computation substrate, but the public assets found are the ephemeris products and CALCEPH readers, not a released full LLR estimator.

name: EPM / IAA RAS
kind: mature ephemeris and web residual service
public_data_status: ephemerides and web O-C services public
rationale: Scientifically mature and explicitly active in LLR residual analysis, but the official site states that the scientific software engine is not distributed, so this is not a local code hand-off candidate.
